pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated source/target compiler configuration with the unified release flag for Java 9+ compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: The source and target options are deprecated in newer compiler plugin versions and may be removed; using release ensures consistent language level and bootstrap classpath.

pom.xml.general_idea: Set the scope of jakarta.annotation-api to provided to avoid packaging conflicts with the container.
pom.xml.why_exists: Packaging the annotation API can cause classloading conflicts or version mismatches with the Jakarta EE container at runtime.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update jacoco-maven-plugin version to a newer snapshot compatible with the migration.
Update maven-checkstyle-plugin version to a newer snapshot compatible with the migration.
Update maven-compiler-plugin version to a newer snapshot compatible with the migration.
Update maven-war-plugin version to a newer snapshot compatible with the migration.

src/main/java/ch/salon/config/CRLFLogCon.general_idea: Replace List.get(0) with List.getFirst() to use the new Java 21 API.

src/main/java/ch/salon/config/WebConfigu.general_idea: Update import statement to use Path instead of Paths.
src/main/java/ch/salon/config/WebConfigu.why_exists: The import for Paths is no longer needed since the code now uses Path.of(), and Path must be imported.
